title: Ministry of Industry, Mine and Trade (MIMT) — Daily Bulletin of Important Economic Indicators (بولتن روزانه شاخص های مهم اقتصادی) + Competitive Industrial Performance Report, recovered via Wayback Machine
source_org: Ministry of Industry, Mine and Trade of Iran (وزارت صنعت، معدن و تجارت), Deputy for Planning — Statistics and Data Processing Office (معاونت طرح و برنامه، دفتر آمار و فرآوری داده ها)
source_url: https://www.mimt.gov.ir (live site geo-blocked — see notes); Wayback Machine snapshots of https://www.mimt.gov.ir/data/mim.gov/statistics_report/{id}/{file}.pdf
download_url: https://web.archive.org/web/{timestamp}/https://www.mimt.gov.ir/data/mim.gov/statistics_report/{id}/{file}.pdf — see files list for exact per-file URLs

files.date_approx: report covers 2016 data, report no. 38, dated Khordad (June) — no clear publication year in filename; captured by Wayback 2022-01-25
files.type: Competitive Industrial Performance Report (عملکرد رقابت صنعتی) — international competitiveness statistics/indicators, bilingual (Persian/English) MIMT flagship report

time_coverage: Daily bulletins: 2021-02-02 to 2021-02-09 (5 of 6 consecutive business days in that window, one day's capture was corrupted — see failures); Competitive Industrial Performance Report: ~2016 data, report #38
units: mixed — described per-table in each Persian-language file
license_terms: Iranian government public statistics (no explicit license stated)
notes: LIVE SITE GENUINELY UNREACHABLE: en.mimt.gov.ir, mimt.gov.ir/en/index.php, teh.mimt.gov.ir, and www.mimt.gov.ir all failed via curl (connect timeout after 12-15s, DNS resolves but TCP handshake never completes — classic geo-block signature) AND via a real browser tab (navigation denied/failed for all of the above). This matches the task's warned pattern for Iran-hosted government sites. FALLBACK USED: Wayback Machine CDX API (web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx). First checked the English site's own 'Yearly Reports' / 'Statistics Report' / 'Industry Indicators' web_directory pages (identified via CDX search on en.mimt.gov.ir) — these turned out to be dynamic AJAX-driven CMS pages (Iranian 'Saman/SIS' government portal software) whose actual list content was NOT captured by Wayback's static snapshot (page literally renders 'Yearly Reports no result' in the archived HTML); the only PDF linked from all three was a generic FAQ document about industrial permits, not statistics. Pivoted to a direct CDX prefix search on the Persian site's actual data path (www.mimt.gov.ir/data/mim.gov/statistics_report/) and found 99 genuinely archived statistics_report PDFs (IDs 390-2162, spanning roughly 2014-2021) plus a separate 'Industrial competition report.pdf' (2022 crawl). Downloaded a representative sample: the 6 most recent daily bulletins (IDs 2157-2162, Feb 2021) — verified via pdftotext as genuine 'بولتن روزانه شاخص های مهم اقتصادی' (Daily Bulletin of Important Economic Indicators) issued by MIMT's معاونت طرح و برنامه / دفتر آمار و فرآوری داده ها (Deputy for Planning / Statistics & Data Processing Office — precisely the 'Information and Statistics' function named in the task) — plus the bilingual Competitive Industrial Performance Report. This is the most recent tranche of statistics_report PDFs Wayback captured; MIMT's site structure or crawl coverage appears to have changed after ~2021, consistent with the current live-site geo-block.

failures.attempted: https://en.mimt.gov.ir/, https://mimt.gov.ir/en/index.php, https://teh.mimt.gov.ir/en, https://www.mimt.gov.ir (all live-site variants)
failures.reason: geo-blocked / unreachable — curl connect timeout (TCP handshake never completes) and browser navigation denied/failed for all variants

Wayback Machine serves a truncated/corrupted capture for this specific snapshot — download consistently stops at exactly 1,048,576 bytes (1 MiB) across repeated attempts (vs. the CDX-reported original length of 989,955 bytes, which is smaller, so this is not a simple length mismatch but a serving-side truncation artifact) and fails PDF integrity validation (pdftotext: 'Invalid XRef entry', 'Missing endstream', 'Couldn't find trailer dictionary'); other same-batch files (2157, 2159-2162) downloaded and validated cleanly, so this is specific to that one Wayback capture, not a general network limitation. Skipped rather than saving a corrupted file to data/raw/.

failures.attempted: English site's Yearly Reports / Industry Indicators / Statistics Report web_directory pages via Wayback
failures.reason: these are dynamic AJAX-driven CMS pages; Wayback only captured the static shell, not the actual report listing (archived page literally shows 'Yearly Reports no result'); the sole linked PDF across all three pages was a generic industrial-permit FAQ document, not statistical data
